steps.t: Léothred can be found at Framsburg. You should talk to Léothred at Framsburg.
Framsburg can be found in Misthallow. You should learn the history of the Rohirrim with Léothred.

Framsburg can be found in Misthallow. You should find Fram's silver horn, buried somewhere in the ruins of Framsburg.
Léothred can be found at Framsburg. You should talk to Léothred at Framsburg.
Hlithseld is located in the north of Misthallow. You should travel to Hlithseld and rest.
